note_on_baseline: Memory's 9.1607 baseline is a prefix-window reading; at ~chunk 1024 the running PPL is ~9.19 for HaloV2 and ~9.16 for TQ1, matching memory. Full 4095-token PPL is monotonically higher by context-growth (RoPE-bug-adjacent? known issue: PPL rises with context per project_ppl_harness.md). All 5 models scored here at full 4095-token single-pass for apples-to-apples.

runs.notes: Baseline. Running PPL crosses 9.16 at chunk 1024 matching memory's 9.1607 gen-1 figure. Full-context number drifts up to 11.99 per known context-growth issue.
PASS. HaloV2 within ±0.05 of TQ1 (|-0.018| < 0.05). Running PPL at chunk 1024 is 9.16, exactly matching gen-1's 9.1607 memory baseline.

FAILED (as predicted). PPL = V = 128256 (vocab size) → model outputs uniform distribution, i.e. pure gibberish. 12.98% flip rate per memory is well past usable threshold. The 2559 tok/s is suspicious and suggests the sherry-v4 kernel path is short-circuiting or producing NaNs that collapse to uniform softmax — worth a separate investigation but not in scope for this read-only bench run.

FAILED: segfault. 'Memory access fault by GPU node-1 on address 0x1f400000 — Page not present or supervisor privilege.' Model loaded OK (hs=2048 is=6144 L=28 nh=16 nkv=8 vocab=151669; sidecar GGUF hydrated 4×28 layer norms + output_norm + token_embd). Crash is on first forward pass. Using halo-1bit-2b.htok as tokenizer override since no .htok sidecar exists for Bonsai; likely tokenizer mismatch triggers OOB logits-gather (vocab 151669 vs tokenizer 128256). Not a kernel bug; dispatch-path issue per memory warning. Skipped per bench instructions (read-only, no fixes).

runs.weight_format: TQ2 post-hoc repack of MS BitNet
runs.notes: FAILED (predicted). PPL = V = 128256 → uniform distribution. Emitted repeated 'rcpp err 1 at bitnet_decode.cpp:692' during run. Consistent with the memo's warning: model goes through Bonsai dispatch path which assumes Qwen3 arch; arch-dispatch-split lane has not landed. Rerun deferred until that split is merged.

gates.model_4_bonsai_tq2: SEGFAULT (GPU memory fault on first forward)

cross_check_vs_memory_baseline_9.1607.at_chunk_1024: TQ1 9.19 / HaloV2 9.16 — matches gen-1 baseline 9.1607 and gen-2 9.1805 cited in CLAUDE.md
cross_check_vs_memory_baseline_9.1607.full_4095_ctx: drifts to ~11.99 for both TQ1 and HaloV2 — known RoPE-adjacent / long-context PPL growth per project_ppl_harness.md
